digitalAssistant.title: HR Digital Assistant
digitalAssistant.description: An Applicant Tracking System (ATS) is a software application used by recruiters and employers to manage the hiring process and organize large volumes of job applications efficiently.

automatedScanner.title: The Automated Scanner
automatedScanner.description: It acts as a digital filter that reads, parses, and extracts raw text from your resume. The system automatically categorizes your information into sections like work experience, education, and skills.

keywordMatcher.title: The Keyword Matcher
keywordMatcher.description: The system scores and ranks your resume based on how well your extracted data matches the specific keywords, skills, and qualifications outlined in the employer's job description.

importanceSection.label: Why ATS Important for Curriculum Vitae?
importanceSection.title: Write a CV that gets seen, read, and shortlisted.

gatekeeper.title: Passing the First Gatekeeper
gatekeeper.description: Over 90% of large companies use an ATS. If your CV is not ATS-friendly, it might be automatically rejected and discarded before a human recruiter ever gets the chance to read it.

visibility.title: Maximizing Your Visibility
visibility.description: A well-structured ATS CV ensures that your most important qualifications and achievements are accurately read by the system, significantly increasing your chances of getting shortlisted for an interview.

formatting.title: Preventing Formatting Errors
formatting.description: Complex designs, graphics, tables, or unusual fonts can confuse the system. Using an ATS-optimized format guarantees your data is extracted flawlessly without losing critical information during the parsing process.

stepsSection.label: How it works
stepsSection.title: Few steps to a finished resume.

first.title: Choose a template
first.description: Start with an ATS-friendly or professional layout that fits your style.

second.title: Fill in your details
second.description: Add your experience, education, skills, and summary in a guided flow.

third.title: Download and share
third.description: Preview your resume, make adjustments, and export a polished final CV.

main.title: My Resumes
main.description: Manage your resumes in one place.
main.empty: No resumes created yet. Click 'Create New Resume' to get started.

toast.personalData: Please fill Job, First Name, and Email before continuing.

cvList.failedToDelete: Failed to delete the resume. Please try again later.

templateSelection.title: Select a Resume Template
templateSelection.description: Choose a template to start creating your resume
templateSelection.atsDescription: A clean and straightforward resume layout designed for maximum ATS readability. This template uses a single-column structure, minimal styling, and clear section hierarchy to ensure all information is easily parsed by applicant tracking systems. Ideal for users who prioritize compatibility and simplicity.
templateSelection.professionalDescription: A modern and visually structured resume with a customizable color accent to enhance readability and personal branding. While maintaining ATS compatibility, this template introduces a sidebar layout to organize key information such as skills and contact details more effectively. Suitable for users who want a balance between professionalism and visual appeal.

ats.description: A clean and straightforward resume layout designed for maximum ATS readability. This template uses a single-column structure, minimal styling, and clear section hierarchy to ensure all information is easily parsed by applicant tracking systems. Ideal for users who prioritize compatibility and simplicity.
ats.modalDesc: Clean, compact, and optimized for ATS parsing.

professional.description: A modern and visually structured resume with a customizable color accent to enhance readability and personal branding. While maintaining ATS compatibility, this template introduces a sidebar layout to organize key information such as skills and contact details more effectively. Suitable for users who want a balance between professionalism and visual appeal.
professional.modalDesc: A polished two-column layout with a sidebar profile.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.description: Add your personal and contact details so employers can easily identify and reach you.

workExperience.title: Work Experience
workExperience.description: Detail your professional history in reverse chronological order. Focus on quantifiable achievements, specific responsibilities, and the direct impact you made in your previous roles.

education.title: Education
education.description: List your academic background, starting with your most recent or highest degree. Include relevant coursework, academic honors, or organizational involvement if you have limited professional experience.

skills.title: Areas of Expertise
skills.description: Highlight technical abilities, industry-specific tools, and relevant soft skills. Prioritize keywords that align directly with the requirements of the roles you are targeting to maximize ATS compatibility.

profileSummary.title: Profile Summary
profileSummary.description: Write a concise, compelling overview of your professional identity. Highlight your core expertise, key accomplishments, and immediate career objectives in three to four sentences.

additionalSections.title: Additional Sections
additionalSections.description: Include supplementary information that adds value to your candidacy, such as professional certifications and Trainings, or foreign language proficiencies.

additionalSectionLanguages.title: Languages
additionalSectionLanguages.description: Specify any foreign languages you are proficient in, along with your exact fluency level (e.g., Native, Professional, Basic). This is highly valuable for multinational companies or roles requiring diverse communication.

additionalSectionLicensesCertifications.title: Licenses / Certifications
additionalSectionLicensesCertifications.description: List official credentials or industry-recognized licenses that validate your professional qualifications. Include the name of the certification, the issuing authority, and the date of acquisition or expiration to establish immediate credibility.

additionalSectionProfessionalTraining.title: Professional Training
additionalSectionProfessionalTraining.description: Detail any non-degree educational programs, corporate training, or specialized workshops you have completed. Focus on training that directly aligns with your career goals and adds tangible value to your skill set.

header.title: Resume Checker
header.description: Test your resume against our ATS parsing engine. Upload your PDF to verify that all essential sections are correctly formatted and machine-readable. Our system will flag any missing or unreadable categories, ensuring your qualifications are flawlessly extracted before you submit your application.

recommendations.title: Recommendations:
recommendations.missingSection: Add a {{sectionName}} section with relevant details.
recommendations.headerOnlySection: Add content under {{sectionName}}, not just the header.

results.title: Checking Result
results.headerOnlyText: This section content is not detected
results.uploadPrompt: Upload a resume to get started
